title: Display
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/SNdNEUp.png)

---
This mod adds new graphic / painting blocks called "Display".\
There is a huge selection of themes and colors.\
More than **40 different** motifs in more than **80 different displays.**

This mod is best to use with other furniture and modern mods. 

---

### <u>**Important information:**</u>

- I recommend using JEI to get a better overview of the different recipes\
-> **Find JEI here: https://modrinth.com/mod/jei**


---

!- This mod was inspired by Displate. Displate sells printed metal posters for which they are very well known and hyped. I do not intend to harm the company in any way and I am not affiliated with Displate in any way.
If there are complaints about the similarity or something else, and it comes explicitly from Displate, contact me privately on CurseForge so that I can avoid unwanted penalties or criminal charges or the like. Thank you for your understanding
Displate can be found here: https://www.displate.com

---

For my mod logo I used the font "Brush Script MT Italic".

***Some examples***
 ![Example Displays](https://i.imgur.com/7Ey5xeb.png)


and much more...
